texto: I found her lying on her stomach, her hind legs stretched out straight, and her front feet folded back under her chest. She had laid her head on his grave. I saw the trail where she had dragged herself through the leaves. The way she lay there, I thought she was alive. I called her name. She made no movement. With the last ounce of strength in her body, she had dragged herself to the grave of Old Dan.
explicacao: Citação de Wilson Rawls sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I found her lying on her stomach, her hind legs stretched out straight, and her front feet folded…” articula amor, love, loyalty em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como loyalty.

I saw the trail where she had dragged herself through the leaves. The way she lay there, I thought she was alive. I called her name. She made no movement. With the last ounce of strength in her body, she had dragged herself to the grave of Old Dan.

texto: Men," said Mr. Kyle, "people have been trying to understand dogs ever since the beginning of time. One never knows what they'll do. You can read every day where a dog saved the life of a drowning child, or lay down his life for his master. Some people call this loyalty. I don't. I may be wrong, but I call it love--the deepest kind of love.
explicacao: Citação de Wilson Rawls sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Men," said Mr. Kyle, "people have been trying to understand dogs ever since the beginning of time…” articula familia, dogs, love em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como love.

texto: He realized that the ritualized world he had dismissed as feminine was in fact civilization.

texto: I believe a boy can have anything in life that he wants once he starts working for it. The main thing is not to give up. It makes no difference how tough things get, just bow your back, keep working, and put your heart and soul into it. As you go along your way, live a good clean life, don't hurt anyone or anything, and always be honest. It doesn't hurt to pray a little, too. If you do all those things-someday you'll have your pony and gun. You'll get help when you least expect it.
